{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Farwing Nebula
| introduced = The Knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Astral Tide]] occurs in the [[Farwing Nebula]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c24">''The Knight'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
